requestBody: {"QUERIES":[{"QUERY_ID":"R1-R1","ROLES":["R","R"],"SELECT":"newTag('R1-R1') as query_id, Count(`row`) AS `个数`, node_type('_0') AS `client_node_type`, -42 AS `client_icon_id`, -42 AS `server_icon_id`, newTag('_0') AS `_0`, Enum(status), status, node_type('_1') AS `server_node_type`, newTag('_1') AS `_1`","TAGS":["node_type('_0') AS `client_node_type`","-42 AS `client_icon_id`","-42 AS `server_icon_id`","newTag('_0') AS `_0`","Enum(status)","status","node_type('_1') AS `server_node_type`","newTag('_1') AS `_1`"],"CTAGS":["node_type('_0') AS `client_node_type`","-42 AS `client_icon_id`","newTag('_0') AS `_0`","Enum(status)","status"],"STAGS":["node_type('_1') AS `server_node_type`","-42 AS `server_icon_id`","newTag('_1') AS `_1`","Enum(status)","status"],"METRICS":["Count(`row`) AS `个数`"],"GROUP_BY":"_0, status, `client_node_type`, _1, `server_node_type`"}],"TABLE":"l4_flow_log","DATABASE":"flow_log","SORT":{"ORDER_BY":"个数","SORTED_BY":"DESC"},"INCLUDE_HISTORY":true,"TOP":"5","window_size":1,"fill":"null","interval":2,"time_start":1784626772,"time_end":1784627672}
